
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick the blue circular object

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From my current position, I need to first approach closer to the objects to better identify the blue circular object. Let me move closer to point P12 which seems to be near the collection of objects.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Walk`

```json
{
  "x": -0.1,
  "y": 0.86,
  "z": -0.81
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762982934117, 'end': 1762982941494, 'elapsed': 7377}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 665.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Walk` → `{'t0': 2244632, 't1': 2245297, 'elapsed': 665}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6374, completion=141, total=6515
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Walk</strong></summary>

**Content**
Target position reached at \(x=\-0.65, y=0.08, z=\-0.81\)

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Now let me look more carefully at the objects to identify the blue circular one.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Look`

```json
{
  "x": -0.1,
  "y": 0.9,
  "z": -0.85
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762982942165, 'end': 1762982949161, 'elapsed': 6996}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 1357.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Look` → `{'t0': 2252302, 't1': 2253659, 'elapsed': 1357}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6548, completion=117, total=6665
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Look</strong></summary>

**Content**
Look complete. An augmented image will be returned in the next user message labeled \[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]. The \[symbolic perception\]\(\#symbolic\-perception\) has been updated

</details>

<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] I can now see a blue circular object that matches the description \- it appears to be tagged as "4" in the image. Based on the symbolic perception, object 4 is located at position \(x=\-0.17, y=0.88, z=\-0.6\). I will attempt to pick up this object.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "4"
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762982950527, 'end': 1762982959505, 'elapsed': 8978}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 719.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `PickObject` → `{'t0': 2262645, 't1': 2263364, 'elapsed': 719}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=8255, completion=130, total=8385
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: PickObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Successfully picked object 4

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have successfully picked up the blue circular object you requested. The object was easily identifiable due to its distinctive blue color and circular shape among the other objects in the scene.

<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762982960231, 'end': 1762982968668, 'elapsed': 8437}`

</details>

</details>
